standard_safeguards.name: Pressure Safety Valve (PSV)
standard_safeguards.description: Spring-loaded relief valve sized for worst-case overpressure scenario including runaway reaction, external fire, and blocked outlet

standard_safeguards.name: High Pressure Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Process alarm at 90% of design pressure to alert operators

standard_safeguards.name: High-High Pressure Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Safety instrumented function (SIF) that initiates emergency shutdown on high-high pressure, closing feed valves and activating emergency cooling

standard_safeguards.name: Rupture Disc
standard_safeguards.description: Rupture disc upstream of PSV for corrosive or polymerizing service, or as independent relief path

standard_safeguards.name: Emergency Depressurization
standard_safeguards.description: Automated or manual depressurization to flare/vent system to reduce vessel pressure in emergency

recommended_additional: Independent pressure transmitter for SIS (separate from BPCS)
Reactor quench system for runaway reaction scenarios
Emergency cooling water supply from independent source
Dump/drain system to safe containment vessel
MORE_Pressure.typical_gaps: Often the PSV is not sized for the runaway reaction scenario. SIS independence from BPCS may not meet SIL requirements. Emergency cooling may share supply with normal cooling.

standard_safeguards.name: High Temperature Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Process alarm at high temperature setpoint to alert operators to take corrective action

standard_safeguards.name: High-High Temperature Trip
standard_safeguards.description: SIF that shuts down reactor feed and activates emergency cooling on high-high temperature

standard_safeguards.name: Emergency Cooling System
standard_safeguards.description: Dedicated emergency cooling circuit independent of normal process cooling

standard_safeguards.name: Reactor Quench System
standard_safeguards.description: Injection of quench medium (water, solvent, or inhibitor) to terminate reaction and absorb heat

recommended_additional: Reaction calorimetry to characterize thermal runaway scenarios
Multiple independent temperature measurements at different locations
Rate-of-rise temperature alarm for early runaway detection
Automatic feed shutoff on loss of cooling
MORE_Temperature.typical_gaps: Single temperature measurement point may not detect hot spots. Quench system may not be adequate for worst-case runaway. Emergency cooling capacity may be insufficient.

standard_safeguards.name: Low Flow Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Process alarm on low feed flow to alert operators

standard_safeguards.name: Standby Feed Pump
standard_safeguards.description: Redundant pump with automatic switchover on primary pump failure

standard_safeguards.name: Low-Low Flow Trip
standard_safeguards.description: SIF that initiates controlled shutdown on loss of feed flow to prevent dry running or overheating

recommended_additional: Diverse flow measurement technology (Coriolis + orifice plate)
Minimum flow bypass line on feed pump
Interlock to shut heating on loss of feed
Emergency operating procedure for loss of feed
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: Pump switchover may not be fast enough. Flow measurement may be unreliable for two-phase or fouling service. No interlock between feed flow and heating system.

standard_safeguards.name: PSV on Low-Pressure Side
standard_safeguards.description: Relief valve on the low-pressure side to protect against tube rupture overpressure

standard_safeguards.name: Pressure Indicators
standard_safeguards.description: Pressure monitoring on both tube and shell sides with high alarms

standard_safeguards.name: Design Pressure Rating
standard_safeguards.description: Both sides designed and rated per ASME Section VIII with adequate margin

recommended_additional: Differential pressure monitoring between tube and shell sides for leak detection
Thermal relief valves on isolated sections
Regular thickness measurements for corrosion monitoring
Tube inspection program (eddy current, IRIS)
MORE_Pressure.typical_gaps: PSV on low-pressure side may not be sized for full tube rupture scenario. No differential pressure monitoring for early leak detection. Thermal expansion relief missing on blocked-in sections.

standard_safeguards.name: Outlet Temperature Control
standard_safeguards.description: Temperature control loop on cooling/heating medium with high temperature alarm on process outlet

standard_safeguards.name: Bypass Valve
standard_safeguards.description: Bypass around heat exchanger for temperature control and emergency operation

standard_safeguards.name: Material Selection
standard_safeguards.description: Materials of construction selected for maximum expected temperature including upsets

recommended_additional: Independent high temperature trip on process outlet
Fouling monitoring program (U-value tracking)
Emergency cooling water supply
Regular tube bundle inspection and cleaning schedule
MORE_Temperature.typical_gaps: Temperature monitoring may only be on outlet, missing intermediate hot spots. No automatic response to high temperature. Fouling allowance may be inadequate.

standard_safeguards.name: Low Flow Alarms
standard_safeguards.description: Flow monitoring on both process and utility sides with low flow alarms

standard_safeguards.name: Bypass Valve
standard_safeguards.description: Emergency bypass for continued operation during loss of one flow

standard_safeguards.name: Temperature Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Outlet temperature monitoring to detect loss of heat transfer

recommended_additional: Interlock to trip heating/cooling on loss of process flow
Standby utility supply (cooling water, steam)
Thermal shock prevention procedures for flow restoration
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: No interlock between utility flow and process flow. No procedures for safe restoration after no-flow event. Thermal shock risk during flow restoration not addressed.

standard_safeguards.name: Column PSV
standard_safeguards.description: Pressure safety valve on column overhead sized for worst-case scenario (condenser failure)

standard_safeguards.name: High Pressure Alarm and Trip
standard_safeguards.description: High pressure alarm with high-high trip to shut feed and reboiler steam

standard_safeguards.name: Condenser Duty Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Monitoring of cooling water flow and temperature to detect condenser problems early

recommended_additional: Emergency condenser or air cooler backup
Inert gas blanket system for vacuum columns
Feed surge drum to buffer feed interruptions
Automatic pressure control on overhead with split-range to vent
MORE_Pressure.typical_gaps: PSV discharge to atmosphere may not be acceptable for toxic service. No backup cooling for condenser failure. Pressure control may not handle rapid pressure transients.

standard_safeguards.name: High Level Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Level alarm in column sump/bottom to alert operators

standard_safeguards.name: High-High Level Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Independent level switch that trips feed pump on high-high level

standard_safeguards.name: Standby Bottoms Pump
standard_safeguards.description: Redundant pump with auto-start capability

recommended_additional: Diverse level measurement technology (radar + displacer)
Overflow line to safe location
Feed flow control with column level cascade
Regular level instrument calibration program
MORE_Level.typical_gaps: Single level measurement technology may fail in foaming service. No overflow protection. Level trip may share same instrument as control.

standard_safeguards.name: Low Flow Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Flow measurement with low alarm to alert operators to pump issues

standard_safeguards.name: Minimum Flow Bypass
standard_safeguards.description: Recirculation line to prevent deadheading and ensure minimum flow through pump

standard_safeguards.name: Standby Pump
standard_safeguards.description: Installed spare pump with auto-start on primary pump trip

standard_safeguards.name: Motor Overload Protection
standard_safeguards.description: Electrical protection to trip pump motor on overload

recommended_additional: Vibration monitoring with trending and alarm
Suction pressure monitoring for cavitation detection
Seal failure detection (leak detection, pressure monitoring)
Bearing temperature monitoring
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: Auto-start of standby may not be fast enough to prevent process upset. Minimum flow bypass may be undersized. No seal failure detection.

standard_safeguards.name: PSV on Discharge
standard_safeguards.description: Relief valve on pump discharge protecting downstream piping

standard_safeguards.name: High Discharge Pressure Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Pressure alarm on pump discharge

standard_safeguards.name: Motor Overload
standard_safeguards.description: Motor protection relay limits maximum power draw

recommended_additional: Discharge pressure trip to stop pump
Pressure-rated piping verified to maximum pump shutoff pressure
Regular pump performance testing
MORE_Pressure.typical_gaps: Downstream piping may not be rated for pump dead-head pressure. No automatic pump trip on high discharge pressure.

standard_safeguards.name: Check Valve
standard_safeguards.description: Non-return valve on pump discharge to prevent reverse flow

standard_safeguards.name: Anti-Reverse Rotation
standard_safeguards.description: Ratchet or other device to prevent reverse rotation of pump shaft

recommended_additional: Dual check valves for critical service
Startup procedure requiring check of valve function
Regular check valve testing program
REVERSE_Flow.typical_gaps: Check valve may not be regularly tested for tightness. Single check valve may stick or leak. No monitoring of check valve performance.

standard_safeguards.name: Anti-Surge Control System
standard_safeguards.description: Dedicated anti-surge controller with recycle valve to prevent compressor surge

standard_safeguards.name: Standby Compressor
standard_safeguards.description: Redundant compressor for critical service

standard_safeguards.name: Low Suction Pressure Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Trip compressor on low suction pressure to prevent damage

standard_safeguards.name: Vibration Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Continuous vibration monitoring with alarm and trip levels

recommended_additional: Performance monitoring system for early degradation detection
Surge detection with fast-acting recycle valve
Emergency blowdown capability
Process simulation of off-design operating cases
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: Anti-surge valve may not be fast enough for rapid transients. Standby compressor startup time may be too long. Vibration trip setpoints may not catch all failure modes.

standard_safeguards.name: High Discharge Pressure Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Trip compressor on high discharge pressure

standard_safeguards.name: Discharge PSV
standard_safeguards.description: Relief valve on compressor discharge

standard_safeguards.name: Anti-Surge System
standard_safeguards.description: Recycle to prevent operation in surge region

recommended_additional: Independent pressure transmitter for SIS
Emergency depressurization to flare
Interstage pressure monitoring and trip
Motor/driver overload protection
MORE_Pressure.typical_gaps: Discharge piping may not be designed for relief valve accumulation pressure. No interstage relief between stages. SIS may share instruments with BPCS.

standard_safeguards.name: High Level Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Tank level alarm at high setpoint to alert operators

standard_safeguards.name: High-High Level Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Independent level switch that closes inlet valve on high-high level per API 2350

standard_safeguards.name: Bund/Containment
standard_safeguards.description: Secondary containment (bund wall) sized for full tank volume

standard_safeguards.name: Operator Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Operator rounds and manual tank gauging during transfers

recommended_additional: Automatic tank gauging (ATG) system per API 2350 Category 3
CCTV monitoring of tank area
Overfill prevention system with SIL rating
Diverse level measurement technology (radar + servo gauge)
MORE_Level.typical_gaps: High-high level switch may be same technology as level gauge (common mode failure). Bund integrity may be compromised (cracks, drain valves left open). No independent verification of tank level before transfer start.

standard_safeguards.name: Low Level Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Tank level alarm at low setpoint

standard_safeguards.name: Vacuum Relief Valve
standard_safeguards.description: Vacuum relief on enclosed tanks to prevent collapse during pumpout

standard_safeguards.name: Leak Detection
standard_safeguards.description: Tank bottom leak detection system and bund monitoring

recommended_additional: Low-low level trip to stop outlet pump
Tank floor inspection program (MFL, UT)
Cathodic protection for tank bottom
Tank settlement monitoring
LESS_Level.typical_gaps: No pump trip on low level (operator response only). Tank floor inspection frequency may be inadequate. Cathodic protection may not be monitored.

standard_safeguards.name: Temperature Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Temperature measurement with high alarm

standard_safeguards.name: Fire Protection
standard_safeguards.description: Foam and water cooling systems per NFPA 11 and 15

standard_safeguards.name: Tank Insulation/Painting
standard_safeguards.description: Solar radiation protection and thermal insulation where needed

recommended_additional: Water spray system for external fire exposure
Vapor recovery system to reduce emissions
Fire detection in tank farm area
Emergency response plan for tank fire
MORE_Temperature.typical_gaps: Fire water supply may not be adequate for simultaneous events. Foam system may not be regularly tested. No detection of internal temperature changes.

standard_safeguards.name: Valve Position Indication
standard_safeguards.description: Open/closed position switches and indication in control room

standard_safeguards.name: Fail-Safe Actuator
standard_safeguards.description: Actuator designed to fail in safe position (open or closed as appropriate)

standard_safeguards.name: Bypass Valve
standard_safeguards.description: Manual bypass for critical service to maintain flow during valve failure

recommended_additional: Partial stroke testing for safety-critical valves
Valve maintenance and testing program
Diverse redundancy for critical shutoff (two valves in series)
Smart positioner with diagnostics
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: Valve fail-safe position may not be clearly defined for all scenarios. Partial stroke testing not implemented. No valve diagnostics to detect degradation.

standard_safeguards.name: Thermal Relief Valves
standard_safeguards.description: Relief valves on blocked-in pipeline sections to protect against thermal expansion

standard_safeguards.name: Pressure-Rated Piping
standard_safeguards.description: Piping designed and fabricated per ASME B31.3 or B31.4/B31.8 with appropriate rating

standard_safeguards.name: Surge Analysis
standard_safeguards.description: Hydraulic surge analysis performed during design to size protection

recommended_additional: Surge arrestors or dampeners for water hammer protection
Slow-closing valve actuators to prevent pressure surge
Pressure monitoring at key locations
Regular wall thickness measurement program
MORE_Pressure.typical_gaps: Thermal relief may be missing on some dead-legs. Surge analysis may not cover all operating scenarios. Valve closure times may not be specified.

standard_safeguards.name: Flow Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Flow measurement with low flow alarm

standard_safeguards.name: Pipeline Pigging
standard_safeguards.description: Regular pigging program for cleaning and inspection

standard_safeguards.name: Heat Tracing
standard_safeguards.description: Electric or steam heat tracing to prevent solidification/hydrate formation

recommended_additional: Wax/hydrate inhibitor injection
Pressure differential monitoring for blockage detection
Emergency bypass or alternate routing
Cold restart procedures
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: Heat tracing may not be monitored for failures. No blockage detection system. Pigging frequency may be insufficient.

standard_safeguards.name: High Level Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Level alarm on high setpoint to alert operators

standard_safeguards.name: High-High Level Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Independent level switch that closes inlet or opens dump valve

standard_safeguards.name: Demister/Mist Eliminator
standard_safeguards.description: Mist elimination device to prevent liquid carryover to gas outlet

recommended_additional: Slug catcher upstream of separator
Interface level measurement for three-phase separators
Diverse level measurement technology
Standby liquid outlet pump
MORE_Level.typical_gaps: Interface level measurement may be unreliable in emulsion-forming service. No protection against slug flow. Demister may flood at high liquid levels.

standard_safeguards.name: Low Level Alarm
standard_safeguards.description: Level alarm on low setpoint

standard_safeguards.name: Low-Low Level Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Trip to close liquid outlet valve or stop downstream pump on low-low level

standard_safeguards.name: Gas Detection
standard_safeguards.description: Gas detection on liquid outlet line to detect gas breakthrough

recommended_additional: Diverse level measurement for low level protection
Automatic feed control to maintain minimum level
Seal pot or liquid trap on liquid outlet
LESS_Level.typical_gaps: Gas blowby detection may not be fast enough. Level measurement may be unreliable at very low levels. No liquid seal mechanism.

standard_safeguards.name: Low Flow Trip
standard_safeguards.description: SIF that shuts fuel gas supply on low process flow to prevent tube overheating

standard_safeguards.name: Tube Metal Temperature Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: Thermocouples on furnace tubes with high temperature alarm

standard_safeguards.name: Snuffing Steam
standard_safeguards.description: Steam injection system to extinguish firebox fire in emergency

standard_safeguards.name: Emergency Shutdown
standard_safeguards.description: ESD system that shuts fuel, feed, and activates snuffing steam

recommended_additional: Individual pass flow measurement and trip
Decoking facilities (online or offline)
Burner management system (BMS) per NFPA 86
Continuous emissions monitoring
NO_Flow.typical_gaps: Individual pass flow may not be measured. Tube temperature measurement may not cover all tubes. Decoking may be infrequent leading to flow maldistribution.

standard_safeguards.name: High Tube Metal Temperature Trip
standard_safeguards.description: Trip fuel supply on high tube metal temperature

standard_safeguards.name: Stack Temperature Monitoring
standard_safeguards.description: High stack temperature alarm indicating excess firing or afterburn

standard_safeguards.name: Fuel Gas Shutoff
standard_safeguards.description: Multiple trip conditions that shut fuel supply: high TMT, low flow, flame failure

standard_safeguards.name: Fire Detection
standard_safeguards.description: Fire and flame detection in firebox and convection section

recommended_additional: Advanced flame monitoring (UV/IR sensors per burner)
Combustion air control optimization
Regular tube inspection (metallurgical, thickness)
Predictive maintenance program for burners
MORE_Temperature.typical_gaps: Not all tubes may have TMT monitoring. Stack temperature alone may not detect localized hot spots. Burner flame quality may not be monitored individually.
